'''Cala Wenn''' was [[Adar Tallon/Legends|Adar Tallon's]] servant.

Wenn performed household tasks on Tallon's home while he was living on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] with his wife [[Kay Tallon|Kay]]. [[Morr Wenn]] worked at the same home. Years later, Adar Tallon decided to [[Escape from Tatooine|leave]] Tatooine with his wife and droid [[LN-26]]. The Wenns were left behind.

==Appearances==
*''[[Tatooine Manhunt]]'' {{Reprint|Tatooine Manhunt}} {{1st}}
